name: codex-taskbar-usage-widget
description: Create, customize, or reuse a Windows Codex usage taskbar widget.

interface.shortDescription: Create or reuse a Windows Codex quota taskbar widget.
interface.longDescription: Build a Windows taskbar widget that displays local Codex 5-hour and weekly quota, or begin from the included verified WPF source template.
defaultPrompt: Create a Codex usage taskbar widget from the included source template.
Customize my Codex usage taskbar widget UI and keep its quota refresh safe.
